disclaimer: Evidence items are constructed for educational purposes. They illustrate typical audit evidence expectations for technology risk management under SC-GL/6-2023.

governance-oversight.auditorFocus: Assessors will verify board-level technology risk governance, CISO designation with adequate authority, approved policy suite, and regular risk reporting to senior management.

evidenceItems.name: Technology Risk Governance Framework Document
evidenceItems.description: Board-approved technology risk governance framework defining roles, responsibilities, committee structure, and reporting lines
commonGaps: CISO reporting line not independent from IT operations

evidenceItems.name: Technology Risk Reports to Board
evidenceItems.description: Quarterly technology risk reports presented to the board or board committee, including KRIs, incident trends, and compliance status
whatGoodLooksLike: Includes KRIs, incident metrics, and compliance status
Board discussion and actions documented in minutes
commonGaps: Limited to incident summaries without risk context

cybersecurity.auditorFocus: Assessors will examine threat management capabilities, SOC effectiveness, vulnerability management programme maturity, and network security architecture for capital market systems.

evidenceItems.name: SOC Operations Evidence
evidenceItems.description: Evidence of security operations centre capabilities including monitoring coverage, detection rules, and incident response metrics
whatGoodLooksLike: Detection rules tuned for capital market threats
Mean time to detect and respond metrics tracked

evidenceItems.name: Vulnerability and Penetration Testing Reports
evidenceItems.description: Vulnerability scan results and penetration testing reports for capital market systems with remediation tracking
whatGoodLooksLike: Regular scanning with full asset coverage
Annual penetration testing by qualified testers
Critical findings remediated within defined SLAs
commonGaps: Findings not remediated in timely manner

technology-risk-assessment.auditorFocus: Assessors will verify that systematic technology risk assessments are conducted, algorithmic trading controls are implemented, and change risk assessments are performed for material changes.

evidenceItems.name: Technology Risk Assessment Reports
evidenceItems.description: Annual comprehensive technology risk assessment reports covering all capital market technology systems and functions
whatGoodLooksLike: Covers trading, settlement, market data, and support systems
Risk ratings aligned with enterprise risk framework
Treatment plans for high and critical risks
commonGaps: Assessment does not cover all technology domains

business-continuity.auditorFocus: Assessors will examine BCP coverage for capital market operations, trading system resilience, DR testing evidence, and settlement continuity arrangements.

evidenceItems.name: BCP and DR Test Reports
evidenceItems.description: Business continuity and disaster recovery test reports for capital market systems, including trading, settlement, and market operations
whatGoodLooksLike: Annual testing covering all critical market systems
commonGaps: No DR testing for trading systems

incident-management.auditorFocus: Assessors will verify incident response plan effectiveness, SC notification compliance, coordination mechanisms, and post-incident review processes.

evidenceItems.name: Incident Response Plan and Exercise Records
evidenceItems.description: Current incident response plan and records of tabletop exercises or simulations conducted
whatGoodLooksLike: Tabletop exercises conducted at least annually
Exercise findings incorporated into plan updates

data-management.auditorFocus: Assessors will examine data governance framework, market data integrity controls, and client data protection measures including encryption and access controls.

evidenceItems.name: Data Governance Framework and Classification
evidenceItems.description: Data governance framework document with data classification scheme and evidence of implementation for market and client data
whatGoodLooksLike: Classification scheme applied to all data assets

third-party-risk.auditorFocus: Assessors will verify vendor risk assessment programme, outsourcing governance, performance monitoring, and fourth-party oversight for technology service providers.

evidenceItems.name: Vendor Risk Assessment Records
evidenceItems.description: Vendor risk assessments for technology service providers including tiering, due diligence reports, and ongoing monitoring evidence
whatGoodLooksLike: All vendors tiered by risk level
Due diligence depth proportionate to tier

emerging-technology.auditorFocus: Assessors will examine controls for algorithmic trading governance, AI/ML risk management, and DLT/digital asset activities if applicable.

evidenceItems.name: Algorithm Governance Records
evidenceItems.description: Records of algorithm approval, testing, monitoring, and periodic review for algorithmic trading systems
whatGoodLooksLike: Formal approval process documented for each algorithm
Testing records including backtesting and simulation

technology-audit.auditorFocus: Assessors will verify technology audit programme coverage, qualified auditor engagement, and remediation tracking for audit findings.

evidenceItems.name: Technology Audit Reports and Findings Tracker
evidenceItems.description: Technology audit reports, findings, and remediation tracking evidence demonstrating independent assessment of technology risk management
whatGoodLooksLike: Risk-based audit plan covering all technology domains
Remediation tracked to closure with SLAs
commonGaps: Findings not reported to audit committee

cloud-services.auditorFocus: Assessors will examine cloud risk assessments, data governance in cloud environments, and exit strategies for cloud-hosted capital market systems.

evidenceItems.name: Cloud Risk Assessment and Governance Records
evidenceItems.description: Cloud-specific risk assessments, data governance documentation, and exit plans for cloud-hosted market systems and client data
whatGoodLooksLike: Exit plans documented for material cloud services
